verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All my Life The Lord's been good to me All my Life The Lord's been good to me All my Life The Lord's been good to me The Lord's been good to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He gave me the victory The Lord's been good to me He gave me the victory The Lord's been good to me He gave me the victory The Lord's been good to me The Lord's been good to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He gave me the Holy Ghost The Lord's been good to me He gave me the Holy Ghost The Lord's been good to me He gave me the Holy Ghost The Lord's been good to me The Lord's been good to me
